nodes.label: meta_rl/test_reward.py — Golden tests for RewardCalculator.  Golden tests that p
Build an EvaluationResult with ATOM-META-RL-004 fields populated.
Vanilla RewardConfig() must have weights summing to 1.0 exactly.          Withou
Off-sum weights must warn (UserWarning) and renormalise.
Weights within ±0.01 of 1.0 must NOT warn.
trades >= stability_trade_norm and win_rate = 1 → full bonus.
Half saturation in trades → half the bonus (with full win_rate).
All-zero inputs → sharpe=0.5, pnl=0.5, dd_pen=0, cost=0,         stability=scale
reward > reward_clip_max is clipped down to the ceiling.          The default pe
reward < reward_clip_min is clipped up to the floor.          Symmetric counterp
When adjusted_drawdown is None, fall back to max_drawdown.          With adjuste
dd > max_drawdown_soft adds extra penalty * (dd - soft).          Build two conf
